description: Phase 0 baseline snapshot — before backtest system enhancements

BTCUSDT_60d.note: All trend trades, no range/crash signals in period

existing_features.signal_delay: Global delay (default 1 candle), NOT per-strategy persistence
existing_features.cluster_analysis: Trades <4h apart grouped, cluster-adjusted win rate
existing_features.mode_confirmation: N consecutive same-mode before allowing signals (default from settings)
existing_features.validation_suite: 6 tools: monte-carlo, walk-forward, heatmap, noise, delay, dsr
existing_features.indicator_series: Full 1H snapshot per candle for frontend charting

not_implemented.persistence_threshold: Signal must persist N consecutive candles (per-strategy)
not_implemented.extend_summary: Wrapper to add new metrics without modifying engine.py core
not_implemented.roundtrip_table: Detailed per-trade table with entry/exit markers
not_implemented.rolling_sharpe: Rolling window Sharpe ratio time series
